title: Add sandbox provider configuration to settings page
description: Enable workspace admins to configure the sandbox provider (local, e2b, daytona, docker) through the settings UI, unblocking sandboxed agent creation.

steps.name: Backend: include sandbox_provider in settings GET/PUT
steps.description: Extend the GET /api/workspaces/:workspaceId/settings handler to return sandbox_provider from workspace.settings, and the PUT handler to accept and validate sandboxProvider in the request body. Valid values: local, e2b, daytona, docker (matching the schema ASSERT).
acceptance_criteria: GET /settings returns sandboxProvider field when workspace has settings.sandbox_provider set
GET /settings omits sandboxProvider when not configured
PUT /settings with valid sandboxProvider persists to settings.sandbox_provider
PUT /settings with only sandboxProvider (no enforcement fields) succeeds
steps.implementation_notes: Add sandbox_provider to WorkspaceSettingsRow (read from settings.sandbox_provider), WorkspaceSettingsResponse (as sandboxProvider), toSettingsResponse mapping, GET query SELECT projection, PUT validation with VALID_SANDBOX_PROVIDERS set, and PUT SET clause.
deliverables: Updated workspace-routes.ts with sandbox_provider support in settings endpoints

steps.name: Frontend: add sandbox provider select to settings page
steps.description: Add a Sandbox Provider section to the settings page with a Select dropdown showing the four provider options. Include a 'not configured' placeholder state. Save on selection change using the existing saveSettings flow.
acceptance_criteria: Settings page shows Sandbox Provider section with Select dropdown
Select shows current provider or 'Not configured' placeholder
Changing selection triggers save via PUT /settings with sandboxProvider
All four provider options are selectable: local, e2b, daytona, docker
steps.implementation_notes: Add SANDBOX_PROVIDERS const, sandboxProvider to WorkspaceSettings type, new card section with Select component below Evidence Enforcement. Use same saveSettings callback pattern. Note: shadcn Select wraps Base UI, not Radix — use items prop for trigger label display if value differs from label.
deliverables: Updated settings-page.tsx with sandbox provider configuration UI
